name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual reconciliation causes late payments. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual reconciliation of invoices and payments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient manual reconciliation of invoices and payments.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual reconciliation causes late payments. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual reconciliation causes late payments. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
